name: Naji Kanounji
title: Software Engineer
tagline: I build backend systems, AI-enabled products, and tools that solve real problems.
summary: I’m a software engineer building backend systems, AI-powered workflows, and product-focused tools. At TomTom, I built an AI-powered feedback triage system, used across slack channels by 2,000+ users and reducing manual triage work by 80%. I also contributed to demo systems showcased at CES 2025.

specialties.title: Backend engineering
specialties.description: APIs, backend services, and internal tools built with reliability, clarity, and maintainability in mind.

specialties.title: LLM product engineering
specialties.description: LLM-backed features that parse, classify, compare, and structure information inside real software products.

specialties.title: Product-minded development
specialties.description: Turning real problems into usable products — from internal tools at TomTom to MatchBeforeApply, an AI platform that helps candidates improve their job fit before applying.
